summary: Extract content tags from local text with apfel.
description: Turns notes, copied text, or document snippets into compact tags for topics, actions, emotions, and objects.

summary: Turn natural language into a shell command with apfel.
description: Generate a single macOS shell command from a natural language request. Supports copy to clipboard and optional execution after confirmation.

summary: Define a word or phrase with apfel.
description: Tiny multilingual dictionary lookup with fixed structured output. Supports input and output language selection plus clipboard copy.

summary: Explain a command, error, or snippet with apfel.
description: Turns a short shell command, compiler error, stack trace, or code snippet into a plain-English explanation. Accepts arguments or piped stdin.

summary: Summarize recent git activity with apfel.
description: Summarizes recent commits or the current working tree diff into a short changelog-style paragraph.

summary: Turn noisy logs into a first diagnosis with apfel.
description: Reads build, test, or runtime logs from stdin, arguments, or a file and extracts the likely cause plus the first practical next step.

summary: Narrate your Mac's current state with dry British humor.
description: Takes a quick local system snapshot and turns it into a short sardonic narration. Supports one-shot mode or continuous watch mode.

summary: Suggest names for things with apfel.
description: Suggests concise names for functions, files, branches, variables, products, or concepts using a requested naming style.

summary: Turn plain English into a shell one-liner with apfel.
description: Generate compact UNIX one-liners and pipe chains from a natural language request using apfel.

summary: Identify what is using a port with apfel.
description: Inspects local listener data for a TCP port and explains what process is likely bound there.

summary: Draft a short reply from local context with apfel.
description: Drafts a ready-to-send email or chat reply from pasted context using a requested tone and length.

summary: Generate a daily standup update with apfel.
description: Turns recent git activity plus an optional note into a concise standup update with yesterday, today, and blockers fields.

summary: Extract action items from notes with apfel.
description: Pulls a short summary, concrete action items, and due dates out of meeting notes, issue text, or scratchpad fragments.

summary: Explain what a local directory or project is with apfel.
description: Inspects a local directory, key project files, and git metadata to summarize what the project appears to be and how to inspect or run it.
